class.name: GDScriptDecomp
class.brief_description: Decompile and compile GDScript bytecode for any supported Godot version.

method.name: compile_code_string
method.description: Compiles the GDScript source string [param code] to bytecode for the version this instance represents. Returns the compiled bytecode, or an empty [PackedByteArray] on failure (call [method get_error_message] for details).

method.name: create_decomp_for_commit
method.description: Creates a [GDScriptDecomp] instance for a specific bytecode revision identified by its commit hash (as an integer). Returns [code]null[/code] if [param commit_hash] does not match any registered revision.

method.name: create_decomp_for_version
method.description: Creates a [GDScriptDecomp] instance for the given engine version string (e.g. [code]"4.3.0"[/code] or [code]"3.5.2"[/code]). If [param p_force] is [code]true[/code], returns the closest-matching instance even when no bytecode revision is registered exactly for that version; otherwise returns [code]null[/code] on a miss.

method.name: decompile_byte_code
method.description: Decompiles the compiled GDScript file at [param path]. On success, retrieve the recovered source with [method get_script_text]. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success or an error code on failure; call [method get_error_message] for details.

method.name: decompile_byte_code_encrypted
method.description: Decompiles the encrypted compiled GDScript file at [param path] ([code].gde[/code]). [param key] must be the 32-byte AES-256 key used to encrypt the script. On success, retrieve the recovered source with [method get_script_text]. Returns [code]OK[/code] or an error code.

method.name: get_all_decomp_versions_json
method.description: Returns an array of dictionaries describing every registered bytecode revision, including version strings, commit hashes, and parent relationships. Each entry is compatible with the [param custom_def] argument of [method register_decomp_version_custom].

method.name: get_buffer_encrypted
method.description: Decrypts the [code].gde[/code] file at [param path] and returns the raw bytecode buffer. [param engine_ver_major] selects the correct encryption format (Godot 3 and Godot 4 use slightly different framing). [param key] must be the 32-byte AES-256 key. Returns an empty [PackedByteArray] on failure.

method.name: get_bytecode_rev
method.description: Returns the bytecode revision (commit hash as an integer) for this decompiler instance.

method.name: get_bytecode_version
method.description: Returns the bytecode format version number for this decompiler instance.

method.name: get_bytecode_versions
method.description: Returns an array of all registered bytecode version strings.

method.name: get_engine_ver_major
method.description: Returns the major engine version number (e.g. [code]4[/code] for Godot 4.x) this decompiler targets.

method.name: get_engine_version
method.description: Returns the engine version string associated with this decompiler instance (e.g. [code]"4.3.0"[/code]).

method.name: get_error_message
method.description: Returns a human-readable description of the last error that occurred during decompilation or compilation.

method.name: get_function_count
method.description: Returns the number of functions defined in the last decompiled script.

method.name: get_function_index
method.description: Returns the index of the function named [param func_name] in the last decompiled script, or [code]-1[/code] if no such function exists.

method.name: get_function_name
method.description: Returns the name of the function at index [param func_idx] in the last decompiled script.

method.name: get_godot_ver
method.description: Returns the engine version this decompiler targets as a parsed [GodotVer].

method.name: get_max_engine_version
method.description: Returns the maximum engine version string that this bytecode revision covers. Revisions span a range of engine versions; use this alongside [method get_engine_version] to see the range.

method.name: get_parent
method.description: Returns the commit hash of the parent bytecode revision that this revision is derived from, or [code]0[/code] if there is no parent.

method.name: get_script_text
method.description: Returns the decompiled GDScript source produced by the most recent successful [method decompile_byte_code] or [method decompile_byte_code_encrypted] call.

method.name: get_token_max
method.description: Returns the maximum token ID defined for this bytecode revision. Useful for validating bytecode before full decompilation.

method.name: get_variant_ver_major
method.description: Returns the major version of the [Variant] serialization format used by this bytecode revision.

method.name: read_bytecode_version
method.description: Reads the bytecode revision commit hash from the [code].gdc[/code] file at [param path] without fully decompiling it. Returns the hash as an integer, or [code]-1[/code] on failure.

method.name: read_bytecode_version_encrypted
method.description: Reads the bytecode revision commit hash from the encrypted [code].gde[/code] file at [param path]. [param engine_ver_major] selects the correct decryption format; [param key] is the 32-byte AES-256 key. Returns the hash as an integer, or [code]-1[/code] on failure.

method.name: register_decomp_version_custom
method.description: Registers a custom bytecode revision definition at runtime. [param custom_def] uses the same layout as entries returned by [method get_all_decomp_versions_json]. [param derived_from] is the commit hash of the parent revision to inherit token definitions from (use [code]0[/code] to start from scratch). Returns the registered revision hash on success, or [code]-1[/code] on failure.

method.name: test_bytecode
method.description: Tests whether the raw bytecode in [param buffer] is valid for this decompiler instance without fully decompiling it. Returns one of the [enum BytecodeTestResult] values. Set [param print_verbose] to [code]true[/code] to print diagnostic output.

method.name: to_json
method.description: Serializes the bytecode revision definition for this instance to a [Dictionary], compatible with the [param custom_def] argument of [method register_decomp_version_custom].

constants.constant: The bytecode data is corrupt or unreadable.
The bytecode is structurally intact but does not match this revision.
The bytecode is valid for this revision.
